nasb.text: They put the ark of the Lord on the cart, and the box with the golden mice and the likenesses of their tumors.

esv.text: And they put the ark of the Lord on the cart and the box with the golden mice and the images of their tumors.

cnv.text: 他們又把耶和華的約櫃，裝金老鼠和痔瘡像的盒子，都放在車上。

ccb.text: 然后把耶和华的约柜和装金鼠以及金毒疮的箱子放在车上。
